blocks.content:
In this milestone, you'll verify that Cloud Provider Observability is successfully collecting metrics from your Azure resources and sending them to Grafana Cloud.

To verify data collection, complete the following steps:
In Grafana Cloud, click **Observability > Cloud provider > Azure** in the main menu.

Click the **Services** tab.

The Services tab displays all Azure services that Cloud Provider Observability has discovered in your subscriptions.

Locate the Azure service you want to verify in the list.

Use the **Service** or **Source** filters to find specific services if you have many resources. For example, filter by `Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines` to view your Virtual Machines.

Check the **Status** column for the service.

A status of **Sending data** indicates that metrics are being successfully collected and sent to Grafana Cloud.

To verify metrics are flowing, click the service name to view its dashboard.

Verify that the dashboard panels display data and that the time series graphs show recent metric values.

It can take up to 5 minutes for the first metrics to appear after creating your credential. If you don't see data immediately, wait a few minutes and refresh the page.
In your next milestone, you'll explore the Azure service data collected through Cloud Provider Observability using pre-built dashboards and exploration tools.
